title: campylospermum duparquetianum
intro: Campylospermum duparquetianum, also known as the African yellowheart, is a plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in West African medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Campylospermum duparquetianum include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate digestive issues. Campylospermum duparquetianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
